name: marketing_skills_for_ai_agents
description: A collection of marketing capabilities tailored for Claude Code and AI agents, focusing on Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering to enhance digital marketing strategies.

inputs.name: campaign_data
inputs.description: Data related to current marketing campaigns including channels, budgets, and performance metrics.

inputs.name: content_brief
inputs.description: Detailed description or requirements for creating marketing content such as ads, copy, or SEO articles.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Raw or processed data from marketing analytics platforms for performance tracking and optimization.

inputs.name: seo_keywords
inputs.description: Keywords or phrases to target for search engine optimization efforts.

inputs.name: growth_metrics
inputs.description: Key performance indicators related to user growth, conversion rates, and engagement.

outputs.name: optimized_campaign_strategy
outputs.description: A refined marketing strategy that increases conversion and engagement based on input analytics and growth goals.

outputs.name: copywriting_content
outputs.description: Marketing content generated or optimized for target audiences and channels.

outputs.name: seo_recommendations
outputs.description: Actionable SEO improvements and keyword usage guidelines to improve search rankings.

outputs.name: analytics_report
outputs.description: Structured report summarizing marketing performance and insights.

outputs.name: growth_engineering_plan
outputs.description: Technical and strategic plan leveraging engineering to scale user growth effectively.

patterns: Analytics interpretation to inform marketing decisions
Integrated growth engineering strategies combining marketing and technical tactics
steps: Collect and input campaign, analytics, content, and growth data
Analyze campaign performance data and identify optimization opportunities
Generate or optimize marketing copy based on goals and target audience
Apply SEO best practices using targeted keywords
Compile analytic insights into actionable reports
Develop and implement growth engineering strategies to scale impact
Iterate continuously based on feedback and new data
use_cases: Improving e-commerce conversion rates using AI-driven CRO techniques
Generating engaging marketing copy for multi-channel campaigns
Enhancing SEO with AI-curated keyword recommendations and content optimization
Analyzing marketing campaign data to identify trends and optimize budgets
Designing and executing growth engineering implementations to accelerate user acquisition

prompt_templates.name: CRO_optimization_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following campaign data and provide suggestions to improve conversion rates: {campaign_data}

prompt_templates.name: copywriting_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Create compelling marketing copy based on this brief: {content_brief}

prompt_templates.name: seo_recommendation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Suggest SEO improvements and keyword integration strategies for these keywords: {seo_keywords}

prompt_templates.name: analytics_report_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate a detailed report analyzing the following marketing analytics data: {analytics_data}

prompt_templates.name: growth_plan_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Develop a growth engineering plan aimed at improving these metrics: {growth_metrics}
